mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM recipe WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wishlist WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND recipe_id = #{recipeId}
mapper.select: SELECT w.wishlist_id AS wishlistId, r.recipe_id AS recipeId, r.title AS title, r.image_url AS thumbnailUrl, r.cook_time AS cookTime, ROUND(AVG(rv.rating), 1) AS avgRating, COUNT(DISTINCT rv.review_id) AS reviewCount, w.created_at AS wishlistedAt FROM wishlist w JOIN recipe r ON r.recipe_id = w.recipe_id LEFT JOIN review rv ON rv.recipe_id = r.recipe_id WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} AND w.recipe_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY w.wishlist_id, r.recipe_id, r.title, r.image_url, r.cook_time, w.created_at ORDER BY w.created_at DESC, w.wishlist_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wishlist WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND recipe_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_recipe (member_id, title, summary, ingredients_json, steps_json, cook_time) VALUES ( #{cmd.memberId}, #{cmd.title}, #{cmd.summary}, #{cmd.ingredientsJson}, #{cmd.stepsJson}, #{cmd.cookTime} )
